news.headline: OlyBet expands partnership with DP World Tour, becomes Official Partner of Open de France. Tallinn, Estonia, Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: OlyBet has enhanced its partnership with DP World Tour by becoming an Official Partner of the Open de France, starting on October 10, 2024, in Tallinn, Estonia. This expansion includes the activation of Tournament Village and branded chalet experiences for customers.

news.headline: Russia: Nuclear five are to meet soon in New York - Tass
US federal authorities work together to dismantle fraudulent crypto firms involving multiple entities and crimes.
news.summary: US federal authorities have taken action against a convoluted network of companies, individuals, and suspected crimes.

news.headline: Malware hits 28K users, steals just $6K in crypto: Report. Tens of thousands infected by cryptojacking malware.
news.summary: Within the last few months, a malware designed for cryptojacking and theft has spread to over tens of thousands of devices. It has been reported that the attackers behind this malware have managed to steal only a total of $6,000 from their victims.

news.headline: Investor sues Bitcoin miner IREN, claiming it exaggerated compute ability and business outlook.
news.summary: A legal case was filed against IREN, formerly known as Iris Energy, by an investor. The investor has alleged that the crypto mining company has exaggerated its capabilities in high-performance computing as well as its future business potential.

news.headline: World Liberty Financial, backed by Trump, suggests integrating Aave in a governance proposal for their crypto project.
news.summary: World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency platform supported by Donald Trump, is seeking to operate as an instance on the decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol Aave. This arrangement could potentially involve a significant amount of transactions and investments as the platform gains integration into the Aave network.

news.headline: Thai SEC considers allowing crypto products in mutual, private funds, favoring high-net-worth investors. Retail investors may have limited access.
news.summary: Proposed changes in Thailand would grant high-net-worth investors greater access to cryptocurrency funds compared to retail investors. The alterations aim to provide increased investment opportunities in the crypto market for affluent individuals in the country.

news.headline: South Korea now permits dividing cryptocurrency in divorce cases, acknowledging them as marital assets.
news.summary: In South Korea, new legislation permits spouses to include cryptocurrency and Bitcoin assets in divorce settlements, considering them as part of marital property. This legal amendment aims to address the increasing prevalence of digital assets in marital disputes. The move sets a precedent for the treatment of cryptocurrencies in legal matters and reflects the growing importance of such holdings in modern relationships. This development reflects a changing landscape where digital assets are becoming more mainstream and are being integrated into existing legal frameworks. It is a significant step in acknowledging the value and relevance of cryptocurrencies in marital asset division.

news.headline: BoJ's Himino: We are not on a pre-set course.
S&P hits record high as Apple, Amazon surge. Dow and S&P settled at record levels. Tech stocks gain. CNN Money index shows investor optimism. Fed debated 25 or 50 point rate cut.
news.summary: The CNBC Market Sentiment Index recorded a slight improvement in market sentiment, remaining in the "Greed" zone on Wednesday. The US market experienced gains, with the Dow Jones and S&P 500 achieving record levels. Tech stocks, led by Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), saw over 1% growth. Investors analyzed the minutes from the September Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting, which showed a debate on whether to cut rates by 25 or 50 basis points. Ultimately, a 50-basis-point cut was chosen after extensive discussion. For the complete story, check out Benzinga.com.

news.headline: BoJ Deputy Gov Himino: Later in the year, we will have more data on pass through of wage hike on prices, and next year's wage negotiations.
BoJ Deputy Gov Himino: We will also know more about pass-through of yen-dollar rate on inflation via import prices.
BoJ's Himino: There are many real rates and all of them are negative.
BoJ's Himino: US consumption and Chinese data may need more attention.
BoJ's Himino: If the outlook for economic activity and prices presented in the July report is achieved, the BoJ will accordingly raise interest rates.
BoJ Deputy Gov Himino: The policy board is going to look at the totality of the data as it makes decisions meeting by meeting.
BoJ's Himino: We are to adjust our degree of easing if the outlook is realized.
BoJ's Himino: We are witnessing record high corporate profits and record high wage increases in Japan.
BoJ's Himino: Japan's economy has started to move again.
BoJ's Himino: Japan's monetary policy is also moving.
FSC Forest Week Campaign in Bonn, Germany urges collective action on climate and biodiversity crises before COP16 and COP29.
news.summary: The FSC Forest Week campaign is urging for global collaboration on climate and biodiversity challenges before COP16 and COP29.

news.headline: COP28 President urges action on UAE Consensus at COP29 in Baku for climate and socio-economic progress.
news.summary: Today, in Baku, Azerbaijan, on October 10, 2024, COP28 President Dr. Sultan Al Jaber urged countries to come together and take action at COP29 to leverage the progress made during the previous year's UAE Consensus. This agreement is seen as a crucial step towards achieving the goals set out in the Paris Agreement.

news.headline: Form 8.5 shows significant shareholding (EPT/RI) changes in Eckoh Plc.
BSS Group acquires On Tap and Aitoc to enhance European eCommerce offerings, expanding digital solutions across continent.
news.summary: Expanding its reach in Europe, BSS Group has merged with On Tap to enhance its digital commerce offerings across the continent. The acquisition took place on October 10, 2024, in Singapore. BSS Group, a renowned provider of comprehensive digital commerce solutions, has now integrated On Tap's expertise into its operations. This move solidifies BSS Group's presence in the European market and enables the delivery of innovative solutions to customers in the region. The exact financial details of the acquisition were not disclosed.

news.headline: MiLaboratories raises $10M in Series A funding round led by Kfund & Speedinvest, unveiling Platforma.bio SDK for genomic research revolution.
news.summary: In San Francisco, MiLaboratories, a pioneer in computational biology, has recently concluded its Series A funding round. The funding was led by Kfund from Madrid, with support from Speedinvest and other global investors. Alongside this achievement, they have unveiled the Platforma.bio Software Development Kit (SDK). This advanced tool aims to simplify and revolutionize the process of creating and providing analytics for biologists.

news.headline: Arf wins 3rd consecutive PAY360 Award for innovation in global payments, Silver for "Best Use of Digital Currencies/Assets".
news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland, on October 10, 2024, Arf, a prominent worldwide liquidity platform catering to licensed financial institutions, was recognized with a Silver award at the 2024 PAY360 Awards for excelling in the "Best Use of Digital Currencies/Assets in Financial Services" category. The event took place on October 2nd.

news.headline: 21Shares launches 44th crypto ETP, FUTR, on Euronext Paris and Amsterdam, part of its 10th crypto basket ETP and first megatheme ETP.
news.summary: On the 10th of October 2024, 21Shares AG unveiled the 21Shares Future of Crypto Index ETP (FUTR) on Euronext Paris and Euronext Amsterdam. This new launch marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its European offerings. FUTR becomes 21Shares' 44th crypto ETP, its 10th crypto basket ETP, and its inaugural crypto megatheme ETP. Based in Zurich, 21Shares is renowned globally as one of the foremost issuers of crypto exchange traded products.

news.headline: MPP&E Capital chooses Edgefolio for hedge fund investor portal; launched systematic quant strategy. London, Oct. 10, 2024 /PRNewswire -  mid-sized hedge fund, Edgefolio - MPP&E Capital live on Edgefolio's investor relations platform.
news.summary: A London-based hedge fund known as MPP&E Capital has recently gone live on Edgefolio Group's platform to introduce its systematic quantitative strategy hedge fund. This announcement was made on October 10, 2024. Edgefolio is the firm that will be used to launch the hedge fund, showcasing their commitment to leveraging technology for investment strategies. This move signifies a significant advancement in MPP&E Capital's approach to reaching investors and managing their quantitative strategy fund more efficiently.

news.headline: Astellas Pharma to showcase VEOZA™ data for menopause symptoms treatment at IMS World Congress on Menopause.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Astellas Pharma Inc. revealed that their novel treatment VEOZA™ (fezolinetant) aimed at alleviating moderate to severe vasomotor symptoms in menopausal individuals will be highlighted in four oral presentations. Astellas Pharma Inc., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 4503, is under the leadership of President and CEO Naoki Okamura. This breakthrough medication is designed to address menopausal symptoms, and its efficacy will be detailed in multiple presentations.

news.headline: Huawei Austria marks 5 years of TECH4ALL Nature Conservation with Biodiversity Forum in Vienna, highlighting tech's role.
news.summary: In Vienna on October 10, 2024, Huawei organized the Innovations for Biodiversity Forum to mark the fifth year of their TECH4ALL digital inclusion program. The event aimed to showcase the intersection of technology and biodiversity preservation. Introduced in 2019, TECH4ALL has been a key component of Huawei's efforts to promote digital inclusion and expand access to technology.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart (Strongest to Weakest): NZD, AUD, CHF, JPY, GBP, USD, EUR, CAD.
Delinea named a Leader in Privileged Access Management by KuppingerCole, solidifying its position in the industry.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Delinea has been acknowledged as a Leader in the KuppingerCole Leadership Compass for Privileged Access Management (PAM), 2024. This recognition highlights Delinea's ongoing commitment to securing identities through centralized authorization. By offering robust PAM solutions, Delinea enables organizations to protect their essential identities and assets effectively. This achievement underscores Delinea's prominence in the industry.

news.headline: SES extends partnership with Sky in UK and Ireland with multi-year contract renewal for satellite capacity at 28.2/28.5 degrees East.
news.summary: SES has recently renewed its partnership with Sky, securing a multi-year contract for satellite capacity and backup services from SES's prime video neighborhood at 28.2/28.5 degrees East. This extension reinforces their longstanding relationship and follows previous agreements between the two companies. SES will supply capacity to support Sky in delivering satellite channel offerings to Sky Q subscribers in the United Kingdom and Republic of Ireland. This agreement ensures continued seamless service for customers in these regions.

news.headline: FBI busts $25M crypto fraud ring: 18 charged in 'Operation Token Mirrors,' involving fake token NexFundAI.
news.summary: 18 individuals and companies have been charged by the FBI for fraud and manipulation as part of "Operation Token Mirrors." This sting operation resulted in the arrest of three individuals in Texas, the UK, and Portugal. The U.S. Department of Justice has revealed that five defendants have pleaded guilty or agreed to do so. The operation successfully seized over $25 million in cryptocurrency assets. The SEC has commented on the case, stating that the manipulation scheme involved creating artificial trading volumes through "on-demand market manipulation" on trading platforms. ZM Quant, identified as a market maker, was involved in supporting trading activities.

news.headline: VILVI GROUP sales in September 2024: 22.81 million EUR (28.5% increase from 2023). Jan-Sept 2024 sales: 181.37 million EUR (17.9% increase from 2023).
news.summary: The VILVI GROUP, comprising Vilkyškių pieninė AB, “Modest” AB, Kelmės pieninė AB, “Kelmės pienas” UAB, “Pieno logistika” AB, and “Baltic Dairy Board” SIA, reported consolidated sales of 22.81 million EUR in September 2024, reflecting a significant 28.5% increase compared to September 2023. Moreover, total sales for the Group during the period from January to September 2024 reached 181.37 million EUR, marking a notable 17.9% growth when compared to the same period in the previous year.

news.headline: Implantica's RefluxStop® receives positive pre-launch market feedback at 2024 American Foregut Society meeting.
news.summary: In Vaduz, Liechtenstein, as of October 10, 2024, Implantica AG (publ.), a leading medtech firm specializing in advanced technology within the body, has announced strong backing from numerous doctors in the United States. The significant interest from these medical professionals indicates a promising start for the company in this market.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric repurchased 3,388,200 common shares worth JPY 8,110,663 as outlined in company’s articles of incorporation.
news.summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO: 6503) in Tokyo has completed its repurchase of company stock in accordance with the Companies Act and company’s articles of incorporation approved by the Board of Directors on August 29, 2024. The repurchase involved 3,388,200 shares of common stock, with a total value of JPY 8,110,663.

news.headline: U.S. stock futures down; Delta Air Lines expects $1.52/share earnings on $14.67B revenue; AZZ Inc. beats Q2 earnings.
news.summary: US stock futures are down this morning, with investor focus likely on Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) and AZZ Inc. (NYSE:AZZ). Delta is expected to announce quarterly earnings of $1.52 per share on revenue of $14.67 billion before the opening bell. Their shares rose 0.1% to $51.00 in after-hours trading. On the other hand, AZZ Inc. reported positive earnings for the second quarter. For further details, visit a financial news website.

news.headline: Final terms for Nykredit Realkredit A/S have been revised. Major changes made. Key details disclosed.

AB Science reports an operating deficit of 3.6 million euros by June 30, 2024, down by 59.5% compared to the first half of 2023. They have a cash position of 9.1 million euros as of June 30, 2023, with an additional 5 million euros from a recent capital increase. The company is actively pursuing clinical development with various programs and updates on their financial standing.
news.summary: AB Science presented its financial results for the first half of 2024, with an operating deficit of 3.6 million euros, down 59.5% from the same period in 2023. The cash position was reported at 9.1 million euros, with an additional 5 million euros from a recent capital increase. The company provided updates on its clinical developments, including the re-examination of the marketing application for masitinib in ALS, positive results in a phase 2 study of masitinib in Covid-19, and progress in the AB8939 microtubule program for AML. For masitinib in progressive forms of MS, results were presented at the ECTRIMS 2024 conference showing positive outcomes in reducing EDSS progression at 3 and 6 months, improving manual dexterity, and decreasing serum neurofilament light chain concentration. Masitinib's safety profile and potential in targeting microglia and mast cells in MS were also highlighted. The article portrays AB Science's financial standing, ongoing clinical developments, and potential opportunities for its drug candidates.

news.headline: Global Trimethylhydroquinone Market valued at USD 711.1M in 2023, expected to reach USD 998.6M by 2033, with a 4.7% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a research report by Custom Market Insights on the Trimethylhydroquinone Market. The global market size was valued at approximately USD 711.1 Million in 2023, expected to reach USD 728.3 Million in 2024, and projected to grow to around USD 998.6 Million by 2033, with a CAGR of about 4.7%. Trimethylhydroquinone is used in various industries, with its primary application in the synthesis of Vitamin E. The pharmaceutical grade segment held the highest market share in 2023, with the synthesis of Vitamin E segment dominating in application. North America, particularly the United States, has a significant market presence in this sector. The report covers market size data, growth rate, key segments, and regulations around the production and usage of Trimethylhydroquinone.

news.headline: BlackRock Finance Inc. notifies participation in Syensqo.
AB Science reports revenues skyrocketing by 30% in H1 2024. Latest updates on company's activities.
Nykredit Realkredit A/S to replace bonds for new lending. #finance #bonds #lending
Men Xin, VP of FAW Group, discusses digital transformation journey in a video on corporate evolution.
news.summary: In Chongqing, China, on October 10, 2024, Men Xin, the Vice President of FAW Hongqi Brand Operation Committee, presented details about FAW Group's digital and intelligent transformation over the past three years. Xin gave a video speech at the Automotive New Quality Productive Force event.

news.headline: Yen selling popular among investors as they prepare for CPI risk, reports show.
China's central bank unveils $71B liquidity tool for institutional stock investors, per Bloomberg.
news.summary: A recent study has found that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached a record low of 3.5%. This marks the lowest level of unemployment in the past 50 years. The report also reveals that the economy added 136,000 jobs in September, with notable gains in healthcare and professional services sectors. Despite these positive numbers, wage growth remains modest at an average of 2.9% over the past year. Overall, the labor market continues to show strength and resilience in the face of global economic uncertainties.

news.headline: profine Group acquires EFP International B.V., Dutch company specializing in aluminium systems for architects.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 10, 2024, profine Group revealed their recent acquisition of EFP International B.V. (EFP), a Netherlands-based company renowned worldwide for its expertise in crafting aluminum profile systems for architects under the brand 'EFP.' This strategic move expands profine Group's reach and capabilities as EFP operates on a global scale.

news.headline: Fivecast launches Discovery solution to address global threats using OSINT innovation in ADELAIDE, Australia.
news.summary: In Adelaide, Australia on October 10, 2024, a company named Fivecast, known for its top open-source intelligence (OSINT) solutions, has introduced a new Discovery solution designed to assist analysts in addressing the rising global security challenges. The solution aims to enhance the capabilities of analysts to effectively navigate the evolving threat landscape.

news.headline: Stora Enso to release Q3 2024 results on Oct 24 at 8:30 EEST. Invitation extended to analysts, investors, and media.
news.summary: Stora Enso Oyj will be releasing its Q3 financial results for the period of January-September 2024 on October 24 at around 8:30 EEST (7:30 CEST). Investors, analysts, and media representatives are encouraged to join in for the update.
